title: Job Profile
description: Represents a job profile definition within the Workday system, defining the qualifications, responsibilities, and classification for positions.

id.description: The unique Workday identifier for the job profile

descriptor.description: The display name of the job profile

jobProfileName.description: The name of the job profile

jobFamily.description: The job family this profile belongs to

isActive.description: Whether the job profile is currently active

isCriticalJob.description: Whether this is classified as a critical job

summary.description: A summary description of the job profile

effectiveDate.description: The effective date of the job profile
